reason: Marty publishes unsigned Credential Issuer Metadata. OID4VCI permits unsigned metadata; this optional signed-metadata module remains skipped until a separately approved signed-metadata feature is introduced.
Marty does not advertise batch_credential_issuance. OID4VCI permits single-credential issuance; enable this module only with a reviewed batch issuance capability.
Marty's active SD-JWT VC configuration requires a JWT proof but does not advertise key_attestations_required. Key attestation is optional until that capability is introduced and tested.
Marty's active issuer profile does not advertise credential encryption. Enable this negative module only with reviewed encryption support and interoperability coverage.
